meta.title: Rockets and Payloads - A Beginner's Guide to Rocket Vocabulary
meta.description:
Want to learn about rockets and spaceflight but don't even know where to start? WELL YOU FOUND IT!

Help support this and other Everyday Astronaut content by becoming a Patreon member! - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Shirts and merch available - http://everydayastronaut.com/shop

Music by Everyday Astronaut (Tim Dodd) - http://soundcloud.com/everydayastronaut

Find me where it all began, Instagram! @EverydayAstronaut
